title: About Me
text: My name is Woo-Sung Hollenhorst, a German-Korean business analytics student. I grew up between Germany and South Korea, which shaped me to be curious, adaptable, and always looking for the story behind data. I’m currently pursuing my MSc in Business Analytics at Dublin City University, building on skills in SQL, Python, and data visualisation.

title: About Me
text: My name is Woo-Sung Hollenhorst, a German-Korean business analytics student. I grew up between Germany and South Korea, which shaped me to be curious, adaptable, and always looking for the story behind data. title: About Me
text:
Background
Before moving to Ireland, I worked in sales, business intelligence, and project management across Germany and Poland, roles that taught me how to translate complex ideas into action. Fluent in English, German, and Korean, I thrive in international environments. Whether I’m analysing trends, building dashboards, or supporting a project team, I’m driven by creating work that helps people make better decisions. I have experience in demand forecasting, sentiment analysis, and business strategy. I’ve worked with tools like Python, BERT, and various machine learning frameworks to tackle complex analytical challenges.

title: About Me
text:
Skills

Programming: Python, R, SQL
Data Science: Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning
Tools: PowerBi, Git, Jupyter, Quarto
Business: Strategy Analysis, Financial Modelling, Market Research

title: About Me
text:
Goals
I’m looking to build a career at the intersection of business and technology, with a focus on analytics and data-driven decision making. I’m currently exploring opportunities within the EU.

title: Woo-Sung Hollenhorst
text: I’m a Business Analytics Master student at DCU Business School with a passion for data science, strategy, and technology. Welcome to my portfolio - explore my projects, learn about my background. If I caught your interest, feel free to reach out to me. Enjoy!
